product.name: ArWoWear T11 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T11 Soft is heavy weight 390 g/m², 100% cotton workwear twill fabric.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T11 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1600N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>30N; Weft>25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Generic workwear twill cotton fabric could theoretically be used for uniforms, but no military/police/uniformed-service use is stated.

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a generic 100% cotton twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls (per technical parameters), with no explicit sector-specific application (military, firefighting, energy, welding, hi-vis, medical, sport, architecture, or transport) stated in the supplied data.

primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly described as a general workwear twill fabric intended for coveralls, with no narrower named sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, medical, hivis) stated. This matches the workwear-industrial category directly.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is stated; the only other suggestion (military) is explicitly not accepted due to lack of explicit uniformed-service use.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit military, police or uniformed-service use stated; only generic workwear coveralls application given.

normalized.primaryRationale: The fabric is explicitly described as a general workwear twill fabric intended for coveralls, with no narrower named sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, medical, hivis) stated. This matches the workwear-industrial category directly.
